hero.badge_2: A+ BBB Rating | Top 10% FL Contractors
hero.headline:
Award-Winning Pools Built With Unmatched
Precision
hero.subheadline: Your pool should be a private resort, not a source of stress. For over 25 years, Somar Pools has delivered luxury design, flawless construction, and white-glove concierge care to South Florida's most discerning homeowners. Sit back — we handle everything.

services.label: Our Expertise
services.headline: Luxury Pool Services Tailored<br class="hidden md:block"> to Your Lifestyle
services.subtitle: From award-winning custom designs to advanced leak detection and concierge maintenance, Somar Pools delivers precision craftsmanship and white-glove care across every service.

cards.title: Custom Luxury Pool Design
cards.description: Estate pools with seamless architectural integration, infinity-edge designs, and smart automation for South Florida's most distinguished waterfront properties.

cards.title: Pool Remodeling & Renovation
cards.description: Modernize outdated pools with premium finishes, cutting-edge technology, and the award-winning craftsmanship that earned us six consecutive Houzz Design Awards.

cards.title: Advanced Leak Detection
cards.description: Pinpoint diagnostics using electronic listening devices, pressure testing, and dye-tracing technology. We find leaks others miss — fast and non-invasive.

cards.title: Pool Automation Solutions
cards.description: Jandy iAqualink installation and service — control filling, chemistry, heating, lighting, and filtration from your phone with elite smart pool technology.

cards.title: Concierge Pool Maintenance
cards.description: White-glove preventative maintenance with detailed email updates after every visit. Trained technicians treat your pool like the luxury investment it is.

cards.title: Pool Repairs & Equipment
cards.description: Expert repair of pumps, filters, heaters, and salt systems. Specialized in fixing poor craftsmanship from other contractors with fast, reliable turnaround.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to Your Dream Pool

steps.title: Schedule a Private Consultation
steps.description: Tell us about your vision. Whether it is a new build, renovation, or ongoing care, we provide a detailed assessment and transparent proposal within 48 hours.

steps.title: We Execute With Precision
steps.description: Our elite team — led by Mario Ramos with 25+ years of mastery — handles every detail. From Jandy automation to hand-finished tilework, nothing is overlooked.

steps.title: Enjoy Resort-Level Results
steps.description: Your pool is delivered to the highest standard in South Florida. Ongoing concierge care keeps it flawless year-round, so you simply relax and enjoy.

about.label: Why South Florida Trusts Somar Pools
about.headline: 25 Years of Luxury Craftsmanship — One Family's Commitment
about.description: Founded in 2000 by Mario Ramos, Somar Pools has spent over 25 years earning the trust of South Florida's most discerning homeowners. We combine old-world craftsmanship with cutting-edge pool technology — from Jandy iAqualink automation to TruSense chemistry monitoring. Six consecutive Houzz Design Awards, a Pinnacle Design Award, and a feature in Luxury Pools + Outdoor Living magazine reflect our unwavering commitment to precision, discretion, and excellence.

features.title: Award-Winning Design Team
features.description: Six Houzz Design Awards, a Pinnacle Design Award, and recognition in Luxury Pools + Outdoor Living magazine. Our portfolio speaks for itself.

features.title: White-Glove Concierge Service
features.description: Every client receives VIP-level attention with detailed service reports, proactive communication, and precision care that treats your pool as the investment it is.

features.title: Advanced Technology Expertise
features.description: Elite-certified in Jandy iAqualink, TruSense monitoring, and AquaPure salinity control. We bring smart pool technology to every project we touch.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. Luxury Standards.
pricing.subtitle: Every project is custom-scoped to your property. Request a consultation for a detailed, no-obligation proposal tailored to your needs.

guarantee.headline: Our "White-Glove Excellence" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you are not completely satisfied with any service visit, we return and make it right at no additional cost. With a 4.4-star Google rating, an A+ BBB rating, and six Houzz Design Awards, our reputation is built on delivering results that exceed expectations. Your satisfaction is not negotiable — it is the foundation of everything we do.

faqs.question: What areas does Somar Pools serve?
faqs.answer: We serve all of South Florida including Fort Lauderdale, Miami, Hallandale Beach, Hollywood, Boca Raton, Coral Gables, Key Biscayne, and communities across Broward County, Miami-Dade County, and Palm Beach County. We also handle select projects in the Caribbean.

faqs.question: How long does a custom pool build take?
faqs.answer: Most custom luxury pool projects take 8 to 16 weeks depending on scope and complexity. We provide a detailed timeline during your consultation and keep you informed at every milestone. Permits, engineering, and inspections are all managed by our team.

faqs.question: What makes your leak detection different?
faqs.answer: We use a three-pronged approach: electronic listening devices, pressure testing, and dye-tracing technology. This combination allows us to pinpoint leaks with surgical accuracy — often finding issues that other companies miss entirely.

faqs.question: Do you offer ongoing pool maintenance?
faqs.answer: Yes. Our concierge maintenance program includes trained technicians, preventative equipment checks, water chemistry management, and detailed email updates after every visit. It is VIP-level care designed for luxury pool owners.

faqs.question: Are you licensed and insured?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Somar Pools is a licensed Florida pool contractor with an A+ BBB rating and a BuildZoom score in the top 10% of all Florida contractors. We carry full liability insurance for your peace of mind.

testimonials.name: Lauri B.
testimonials.text: From start to finish they were prompt, every step of the way!! The quality of work is beyond what we imagined!!

testimonials.name: Rebecca L.
testimonials.text: The best company I have worked with... No hidden costs, cheap materials or shadiness. Somar Pools delivered exactly what they promised and more.

testimonials.name: Adrienne S.
testimonials.text: Somar Pools is TOTAL quality client service! It's like VIP service is their REGULAR thing. I would not trust anyone else with my pool.
